caption:
You spend real money getting leads in the door.

Most owners have no idea what slow follow-up hands back out the other side.

Black Arrow built a free tool for this: the Lead Response Audit.

Four inputs about how your business follows up right now.

Three numbers back: your response score, how many leads go cold every month, and the revenue at risk.

Research on lead response times shows only 17% of service businesses answer a new lead within an hour.

Respond in under 5 minutes and you roughly double your close rate.

Run your own numbers this week before you spend another dollar on ads.

DM "AUDIT" and Black Arrow will walk you through your score.

#SpeedToLead #LeadFollowUp #ServiceBusiness #HomeServices #CRM
rationale: Carousels currently win saves and depth for B2B/educational content per 2026 benchmarks, and this fills the under-served Offers/Lead Magnets slot by featuring an actual published free tool tied to the core speed-to-lead fact.
